name: create_subscription
description: Create a recurring subscription in Razorpay for a customer. You must first create a plan, then create a subscription linking the customer to that plan. Razorpay handles automatic recurring charges, retry logic on failures, and customer notifications.

parameters.name: plan_id
parameters.description: The ID of the plan to subscribe the customer to (starts with 'plan_').

parameters.name: total_count
parameters.description: Total number of billing cycles. For a monthly plan with total_count=12, the subscription runs for 12 months.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Number of units (multiplied with the plan amount). Default 1.

parameters.name: customer_notify
parameters.description: Whether Razorpay should notify the customer. 1 = yes, 0 = no.

parameters.name: start_at
parameters.description: Unix timestamp for when the subscription should start. If omitted, starts immediately.

parameters.name: expire_by
parameters.description: Unix timestamp after which the subscription link expires if not authorized.
